name: fries-on-the-pier
description: A gentle meal-time nudge and guarded McDonald's China ordering flow powered by the official mcd-mcp service.

interface.shortDescription: 饭点后轻提醒，并安全地帮你进入点单流程。
interface.longDescription: Fries on the Pier notices lunch or dinner windows during coding sessions, adds a restrained meal-time nudge at the end of a response, then guides an explicit, user-confirmed McDonald's China ordering flow through the official mcd-mcp service.
